claimText: Cicadas have recently returned to the Silent Valley National Park in Kerala.
evidenceExcerpt: Cicadas have returned to Kerala's Silent Valley National Park.
examUse: Statement-based question on recent species sightings or Silent Valley biodiversity.

claimText: Cicadas are found in warm and temperate biomes.
evidenceExcerpt: They occur in warm and temperate biomes
examUse: Statement-based question on the geographical distribution of Cicadas.

claimText: The life cycle of cicadas consists of three stages: egg, nymph, and adult.
evidenceExcerpt: have a life cycle of three stages: egg, nymph, and adult.
examUse: Statement-based question on insect life cycles.
distractorHooks: Only two stages: egg and adult

claimText: Adult female cicadas usually lay their eggs in woody plant tissues.
evidenceExcerpt: Adult females usually lay eggs in woody plant tissues.
examUse: Statement-based question on the reproductive behavior of cicadas.

claimText: Most cicada species produce exceptionally loud songs by the rapid buckling and unbuckling of drum-like structures known as tymbals.
evidenceExcerpt: Most species produce an exceptionally loud song by the rapid buckling and unbuckling of drum-like tymbals.
examUse: Statement-based question on the mechanism of sound production in insects.
distractorHooks: Rubbing hind legs against their abdomen
